name: Pay Less Jewelry & Paymore Pawn
description_short: Pay Less Jewelry & Paymore Pawn is a pawn shop in Oakland Park, FL offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metals buying services.
description_long:
Pay Less Jewelry & Paymore Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 405 Prospect Rd in Oakland Park, Florida. The business model centers on providing quick access to cash by accepting valuable items—particularly jewelry and precious metals—as collateral for short-term loans. This type of lending has been a cornerstone of consumer finance for centuries, serving individuals who need immediate funds without credit checks or lengthy application processes.

Based on the available information, the shop offers pawn loans secured by jewelry and precious metals. Customers can bring valuable items, receive an appraisal, and borrow money against those items. The standard pawn model allows borrowers to reclaim their items by repaying the loan plus interest within a specified timeframe, typically 30-90 days depending on state regulations and store policy. The company also appears to engage in buying precious metals and jewelry outright, providing another liquidity option for customers with items to sell.

The business distinguishes itself through convenient local access in the Oakland Park area, with extended weekday hours (10:00 AM to 5:30 PM Monday-Friday) and weekend availability. The direct phone contact (954) 267-9088 and physical storefront location provide personal service and immediate assessment of items, which is a key advantage over online-only lending platforms. The "Pay Less" branding suggests a positioning around competitive rates or terms within the pawn industry.

Pawn loans serve a legitimate but high-cost financing need. Borrowers should understand that pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank loans, though the exact rates are not disclosed on this Waze listing. The primary advantage is speed and accessibility for individuals without credit history or those facing credit difficulties. However, the risk of losing valued possessions if loans cannot be repaid is significant, and the effective APR can exceed 200% annualized.
pros: Same-day cash access without credit checks or application delays
Extended weekday hours (10:00 AM-5:30 PM) provide convenient access
Weekend availability (Saturday 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, Sunday 10:30 AM-3:30 PM)
Local Oakland Park location eliminates online shipping delays for item appraisal
Direct phone contact available for quick quotes before visiting (954) 267-9088
No background investigation or credit impact from pawn loans
Flexible collateral options—accepts jewelry and precious metals
cons: Pawn loans typically carry very high interest rates (often 200%+ APR when annualized), significantly higher than bank loans
Risk of permanent loss of personal valuables if unable to repay loan within required timeframe
No specific rate or term information disclosed on their Waze listing, limiting transparency
Pawn loans do not build credit history—borrowers receive no benefit toward credit score improvement
Store hours are limited (closed after 5:30 PM weekdays), which may inconvenience working customers
best_for: Individuals with jewelry or precious metals who need immediate emergency cash
People with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Those facing short-term cash flow needs and confident they can repay within 30-90 days
diagnosis: Pay Less Jewelry & Paymore Pawn is best for individuals with valuable jewelry or precious metals who need same-day emergency cash and cannot access traditional credit. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are an extremely expensive form of credit with annualized rates frequently exceeding 200%, and borrowers risk losing sentimental or valuable possessions if unable to repay within the required timeframe.
services: Pawn loans secured by precious metals
